title: Ultra Realistic Luxury Lifestyle Portrait Beautiful Young
sourceTitle: Ultra Realistic Luxury Lifestyle Portrait Beautiful Young
prompt: Ultra-realistic luxury lifestyle portrait of a beautiful young woman with long wavy platinum-blonde hair, fair luminous skin, light green eyes, and soft natural glam makeup. She is seated elegantly on a cream-colored designer sofa inside an upscale modern café with warm wooden architecture, curved archways, floor-to-ceiling glass walls, and sophisticated interior design. She wears a fitted ivory ribbed athleisure set consisting of a one-shoulder crop top and high-waisted leggings that create a sleek minimalist silhouette. A navy luxury baseball cap and premium black over-ear wireless headphones complete the look. Her hands gently rest on both sides of the headphones while maintaining calm direct eye contact with the camera. A designer monogram shoulder bag with gold hardware sits beside her on the sofa. Natural daylight streams through the café, creating soft highlights, realistic shadows, and warm reflections on the wood surfaces. The atmosphere feels luxurious, relaxed, modern, and effortlessly stylish. Quiet luxury aesthetic, fashion influencer lifestyle, premium travel content, editorial photography, photorealistic skin texture, detailed hair strands, realistic fabric texture, luxury resort café ambiance, magazine-quality image.
